title: Junior Growth Analyst - Lion Studios
required_skills: Organised with high attention to detail
bonus_skills: Digital marketing or performance marketing experience
Familiarity with mobile KPIs (CPI, ROAS, LTV, retention)
Exposure to AppLovin, Meta Ads, Google Ads
Interest in AI tools and automation
matched_skills: Analytical and metric-driven — core throughout CV
Organised with attention to detail (Hapag-Lloyd QA, HSBC reporting)
Master's degree in analytical field (Management & Entrepreneurship)
Campaign analytics and ROI measurement (IPC, GRG Banking)
missing_skills: UA platform experience (AppLovin, Meta Ads, Google Ads)
Mobile KPIs (CPI, LTV, retention) — only partial ROAS match
App Store / Google Play ecosystem knowledge
core_responsibilities: Manage full UA process for mobile game portfolio
Oversee marketing campaigns across multiple channels and platforms
Produce ROI reporting and analysis, identify new opportunities
Experiment and analyse campaigns for existing and new games
Develop creative briefs and manage external partner relationships
recommended_emphasis: Frame campaign analytics and ROI measurement from IPC and Moli Media as performance marketing analogue
Highlight analytical mindset, fast learning, and adaptability
Mention ROAS and funnel analysis experience as mobile KPI foundations
Be honest about mobile gaming being a new domain — position as eager learner
Do not fabricate gaming or UA platform experience
